title: Protocol for removing ssDNA from dsDNA or RNA Samples (NEB #M0568)
author: New England   Biolabs

steps_raw.instruction: Prepare a 20 µL reaction as follows: %s %s *Most PCR buffers are compatible. **No reaction buffer is necessary if enzyme is added to a PCR reaction. ***Scale larger reaction volumes proportionally.
Stop reaction by heat-inactivation at 80 °C for 00:01:00 .
